The Armoury: Two-Handed Blade Collection

A definitive catalog of heavy steel and enchanted alloys. These artifacts represent the pinnacle of 2D concept craftsmanship, prepared for high-fidelity 3D pipelines. Each blade carries the weight of fallen empires and the sharpness of runic focus.
